judgment.summary: High-growth cybersecurity leader with strong gross margins and cash flow, though currently trading at a premium valuation with negative net profitability.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 1.12 beat the 1.10 estimate by 1.6%, with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-06-03.
positives: Gross margin 74.8% — indicates strong core product profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.60B — demonstrates robust cash generation capabilities.
Total cash $5.23B vs total debt $820.08M — reflects a highly liquid balance sheet.
Analyst growth est for current FY 30.1% — suggests strong expected revenue expansion.
negatives: Forward P/E 93.49 — suggests the stock is priced for extremely high growth.
Profit margin -3.4% — indicates the company is currently operating at a net loss.
Mean analyst target $493.19 — sits significantly below the current spot price of $576.98.
Price/Sales (TTM) 30.50 — reflects a high valuation relative to revenue.
